name: @nethermindeth/aztec-fpc-sdk
description: SDK helper for constructing FPC payment methods

scripts.format: biome format --write src test package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.biome:check: biome check --write src test package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.biome:ci: biome ci src test package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: biome lint src test package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.ci: bun run format && bun run biome:ci && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run copy-artifacts && bun run typecheck && bun run build
